ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of checking a stopwatch, emphasizing the careful observation of time. The robot will bring both arms forward, as if holding a stopwatch, then bring its hands together in a gesture that mimics looking at the time. The sequence will end with a return to a neutral pose.  The robot's lack of hands will be addressed by implying a 'holding' and 'observing' action through arm positioning. We will use subtle variations in joint angles to create a natural flow and avoid rigid movements.  The left arm will primarily serve as a counterpoint to the right arm's more expressive movements.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to start
arms lift forward, holding an imaginary stopwatch
hands come together, intently checking the time
arms return to rest, the measurement is complete
